ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site or department where the document is hosted */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of views or hits the document has received */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the document belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of document */,
  "version_control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version control record */,
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access control record */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the actual file on the server */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and categorization */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is public or private */,
  "parent_doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent document for version control */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site or department */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department under which the site operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the site was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the site was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the author account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the author account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Professional title of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the type was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being tracked */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the changes were made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access control record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access control record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access control record (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_updates_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was revised */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revisions made */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_revisions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the department was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the department (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-department relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned to a department */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being granted a permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission being granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
